raw_output: A colorful fruit skewer platter with melon, berries, and grapes is a fun, refreshing snack that kids love! It’s easy to prepare, stays fresh, and makes a great visual treat at a potluck. Just check labels for hidden ingredients (like some sweeteners or additives) to ensure it’s safe for everyone. This snack is always a hit with kids and keeps things light and playful! 😊
